name: OPPO F21S Pro 5G
description: OPPO F21S Pro 5G is a powerful mid-range smartphone with 5G connectivity, 64MP triple camera, and a 90Hz AMOLED display.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra features a powerful Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor, 200MP camera, and built-in S Pen.

name: Apple MacBook Air M3
description: Apple MacBook Air M3 features the powerful M3 chip, 15.3-inch Liquid Retina display, and all-day battery life.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with premium sound quality, 30-hour battery life, and comfortable lightweight design.

name: Nike Air Max 270
description: Nike Air Max 270 features the largest Air unit in the heel for maximum cushioning and a stylish modern design.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S
description: Logitech MX Master 3S wireless mouse with 8K DPI tracking, quiet clicks, and ergonomic design for productivity.

name: LG 65-inch OLED TV C3
description: LG OLED C3 with self-lit pixels, Dolby Vision, Dolby Atmos, and a sleek design for a cinematic experience.

name: Adidas Ultraboost Light
description: Adidas Ultraboost Light running shoes with Light BOOST midsole, Continental rubber outsole, and Primeknit upper.

name: Canon EOS R6 Mark II
description: Canon EOS R6 Mark II mirrorless camera with 24.2MP sensor, 4K 60fps video, and advanced autofocus system.

name: Dyson V15 Detect Vacuum
description: Dyson V15 Detect cordless vacuum with laser illumination, piezo sensor, and up to 60 minutes of fade-free suction.
